footer.description: A platform to manage trade, warehousing, and delivery in one system in Uzbekistan. Pre-registration is open now.

errors.notFoundText: This page doesn't exist on this site.

hero.subtitle: Barakali Savdo connects sellers, shops, suppliers, warehouses, couriers, and buyers in one workflow.
hero.panelProofText: Status changes only after proof is saved

about.title: What is Barakali Savdo?
about.subtitle: In plain terms: the seller creates an order, books warehouse space, the supplier delivers goods, and the courier brings them to the customer. Each role does its part.

cards.title: Order creation
cards.text: The seller creates an order for the customer. Goods come from a supplier or their own warehouse.

cards.title: Warehouse & delivery
cards.text: Warehouse space is booked, the supplier sends goods to the warehouse. The courier delivers to the customer.

cards.title: Clear and organized
cards.text: Each role knows its task — you can see where every order stands.

roles.title: Who is it for?
roles.subtitle: Each role has its own job — seller, warehouse, supplier, courier, and buyer.

items.title: Platform administrator
items.description: Manages the platform and helps users.
items.benefit: The system runs smoothly and trade keeps moving.

items.title: Seller owner
items.description: Registers, sources or adds products, creates a warehouse or books space, and creates orders.
items.benefit: All trade in one place — no manual spreadsheets.

items.title: Seller manager
items.description: Tracks daily orders, customers, and warehouse occupancy.
items.benefit: The team works from the same data — less confusion.

items.title: Shop owner
items.description: Manages stock, sales, and expiry dates.
items.benefit: Stock and profit are visible — fewer losses.

items.title: Supplier
items.description: Creates product batches. Sellers book them; goods are sent to the chosen warehouse when they arrive.
items.benefit: Orders are planned ahead — fewer unnecessary shipments.

items.title: Warehouse owner
items.description: Registers a warehouse, sets price per m², and accepts booking requests via a 2D layout.
items.benefit: Empty space gets booked — revenue grows.

items.title: Warehouse staff
items.description: Receives, stores goods, and processes outbound shipments.
items.benefit: You know what's where — less searching and mix-ups.

items.title: Courier
items.description: Sees orders. Assigned by the seller or applies with «I'll deliver».
items.benefit: Tasks are organized; delivery follows a clear plan.

items.title: Buyer
items.description: The seller creates an order, goods are prepared, and the customer receives them.
items.benefit: The customer knows order status and can report issues quickly.

warehouse.title: Book space on a 2D layout
warehouse.subtitle: The seller picks the m² they need — the warehouse owner sees free, occupied, and booked zones on one 2D map.
warehouse.sellerText: Chooses the required m² and sends a booking request.
warehouse.selectedReady: Selected: {{sqm}} m² ({{count}} cells) — ready to submit
warehouse.selectCell: Select one or more available cells
warehouse.ownerText: Sees free, occupied, and booked zones on the 2D layout and confirms requests.

map.title: Tashkent warehouses
map.subtitle: Find a nearby warehouse on the map — space, area, and address in one place.
map.demoHint: Set VITE_MAPTILER_API_KEY in your .env file for the live map
map.loadError: Map failed to load. Check your API key.

partners.title: Become a partner
partners.subtitle: Join the platform — get clients and orders for your role.

items.title: Warehouse owner
items.pitch: Be our partner — list your warehouse on the map and attract clients.

items.title: Seller
items.pitch: Join as a partner — manage orders, warehousing, and delivery in one system.

items.title: Supplier
items.pitch: Publish your product batches — sellers book from you and place orders.

items.title: Courier
items.pitch: Take delivery jobs — sellers assign you or you apply yourself.

items.title: Shop owner
items.pitch: Connect your shop — manage stock, sales, and delivery on one platform.

items.title: Buyer
items.pitch: Share what convenient ordering and delivery should look like — we'll improve the service for you.

workflow.title: How does each role work?
workflow.subtitle: Buyer, seller, warehouse, supplier, and courier — each has its own workflow.

items.title: Buyer
items.summary: For the buyer it's simple — the seller creates an order, goods are prepared, the customer receives them.

steps.title: Seller creates the order
steps.text: The seller creates an order for the customer — product and quantity are chosen.

steps.title: Supplier picks from warehouse
steps.text: Required goods are taken from the warehouse or prepared by the supplier.

steps.title: Customer receives
steps.text: The order is delivered and accepted by the customer.

items.title: Seller
items.summary: The seller registers, sets up products and warehouse, then creates orders.

steps.title: Registers
steps.text: Registers on the platform as a seller.

steps.title: Chooses product source
steps.text: Can buy from suppliers or add their own products.

steps.title: Sets up warehouse
steps.text: Creates their own warehouse or books space in an existing one.

steps.title: Creates orders
steps.text: Creates orders for customers and tracks progress.

items.title: Warehouse owner
items.summary: The warehouse owner lists space and accepts booking requests from sellers.

steps.title: Registers warehouse
steps.text: Registers and lists the warehouse on the platform.

steps.title: Shows price and area
steps.text: Area size and price per m² are displayed.

steps.title: Requests via 2D layout
steps.text: Accepts booking requests via the 2D layout — by m².

steps.title: Accepts request
steps.text: If it fits — accepts the request and gets seller contact details.

items.title: Supplier
items.summary: The supplier lists product batches; sellers book them.

steps.title: Shows price and timing
steps.text: Delivery time, unit price, and wholesale price are shown.

steps.title: Sellers book
steps.text: Sellers leave a «I'll buy» request and book.

steps.title: Sends to warehouse
steps.text: When goods arrive — they're sent to the seller's chosen warehouse.

items.title: Courier
items.summary: The courier sees orders — gets assigned or applies themselves.

steps.title: Sees orders
steps.text: Views the list of available orders.

steps.title: Assigned by seller
steps.text: If the seller assigns a courier — the task appears in the courier dashboard.

steps.title: Applies themselves
steps.text: Or applies to a suitable order — «I'll deliver».

steps.title: Delivery details
steps.text: After acceptance — gets seller and buyer details.

why.title: Problems and solutions
why.subtitle: Everyday trade pain points and how Barakali Savdo helps.
painPoints: Sellers learn warehouse occupancy too late
Supplier delivers before demand is gathered
Courier says delivered, customer didn't receive

solutions.solution: Each role does its job — orders move in order
Spaces and m² price are visible; booking is known in advance
Courier and customer details are clear — delivery follows plan
Each role has its task — no mixed responsibilities

connections.title: How roles connect
connections.subtitle: The seller is at the center — connected to supplier, warehouse, courier, and buyer.
connections.summary: The seller creates orders; supplier and warehouse prepare goods; the courier delivers

example.title: Example: phone accessories seller
example.subtitle: How daily trade can work — a simple story.
example.p1: Aziz sells phone accessories. He pre-registers, books a case batch from supplier Karim, and space at the Sergeli warehouse.
example.p2: A customer orders 3 cases — Aziz creates the order in the system. Karim sends goods to the warehouse on time. Warehouse staff receives them.
example.p3: Courier Jasur applies with «I'll deliver» or Aziz assigns him. After acceptance he gets the customer's address and contacts.
example.p4: The customer receives the order. If there's an issue — they contact the seller.

items.question: What is Barakali Savdo?
items.answer: A unified workflow platform for sellers, warehouses, suppliers, and couriers in Uzbekistan.

items.question: Is pre-registration free?
items.answer: Yes. Pre-registration is free. Early registrants are planned to get 1 year of free use.

items.question: When will it launch?
items.answer: The project is in development. Pre-register — we'll contact you at launch.

items.question: Who can use it?
items.answer: Seller, shop, supplier, warehouse owner, courier, and buyer — each enters with their role.

items.question: How to contact you?
items.answer: Phone: +998 90 985 43 15, email: zhonglifiverr@gmail.com, or message us on Telegram.

comingSoon.title: Next up — more capabilities
comingSoon.subtitle: The platform keeps evolving. Here's what's planned for the near future.
comingSoon.ctaText: Submit an application and pre-register — your early interest motivates our team and helps us launch faster.

items.title: Logistics roles
items.text: Document workflows and deal management on the platform are coming soon.

items.title: Secure deals
items.text: A reliable process for working with large companies is planned — transparent and structured.

items.title: Chat system
items.text: A chat system for quick communication between partners and customers will be added.

items.title: Many more updates
items.text: We're building plenty of new features to make daily trade even easier — stay tuned.

pricing.title: Plans for every role
pricing.subtitle: Whether you're a seller, shop, supplier, warehouse, courier, or buyer — pick the model that fits.
pricing.bannerSub: Pre-register and use the platform free for one year after launch.
pricing.roleTabsSub: Separate plans per role. Choose subscription or partnership.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: List your business on the platform for free. A small share of each sale or service goes to the platform.
points: No monthly fee — pay only when you earn
partnership.goodFor: Best for: warehouse owners, suppliers — those who want visibility and orders on the platform.

subscription.title: Standard subscription
subscription.description: Pay a fixed monthly amount for your chosen plan. Costs are predictable — no surprise percentages.
subscription.goodFor: Best for: sellers, shop owners — those who want stable, predictable costs.

premium.name: Biznes Premium
premium.description: For active sales and multiple branches.
